subcodes.first_line: O kind friends! The darkness of ignorance had enveloped India, and souls were blinded in utter heedlessness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران مهربان هندوستان را ظلمت جهل احاطه نموده بود و نفوس در نهایت غفلت کور
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
